# U.S. Stair Corporation – Metal Stairs Specification Sheet (Section 05 51 00)

## Annotations & Callouts

- Section number: **05 51 00 – METAL STAIRS**
- Document part: **PART 1 GENERAL**

### 1.1 SUMMARY – Section Includes:
- Steel stair framed of structural sections
- Treads
- Risers

### 1.2 SUBMITTALS

**A. Shop Drawings:**
- Indicate profiles, sizes, connection attachments, reinforcing, anchorage, size and type of fasteners, and accessories
- Indicate welded connections using standard AWS A2.4 welding symbols. Indicate net weld lengths

**B. Welders' Certificates:**
- Certify welders and welding procedures employed on the Work, verifying AWS qualification within previous 12 months

**C. Delegated Design Submittals:**
- Submit signed and sealed Shop Drawings with design calculations

**D. Field Quality-Control Submittals:**
- Indicate results of Contractor-furnished tests and inspections

### 1.3 QUALITY ASSURANCE

- **A.** Welders and Welding Procedures: AWS D.1 qualified within previous 12 months for employed weld types
- **B.** Fabricator: Company specializing in fabricating products specified in this Section with minimum three years' documented experience
- **C.** Erector: Company specializing in performing Work of this Section with minimum three years' documented experience and approved by manufacturer
- **D.** Licensed Professional: Professional engineer experienced in design of stairs, licensed in the state that the project is located

---

*This document is the first page of a 4-page metal stair specification (Section 05 51 00) establishing general requirements, submittal procedures, and quality assurance standards for structural steel stair fabrication and erection.*
